section.heading: Retirement: retirement for years of service; selective early retirement

subsection.heading: Retirement for Years of Services.—
subsection.content: Sections 633 through 636 of this title shall apply to the retirement of officers in competitive categories of officers designated for purposes of this subchapter.

subsection.heading: Selective Early Retirement.—
subsection.content: Sections 638 and 638a of this title shall apply to the retirement of officers described in subsection (a).
